title: senecio ovatus
intro: Senecio ovatus, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant. Senecio ovatus can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
